title: docs: image/signature: Document ASCII Armor Message not supported
body:
This PR updates the `containers-signature(5)` man page with the clarification that the ASCII-armored container OpenPGP signatures are not supported.

Fixes: #637

comments.body: A quick clarification: if ASCII Armor is not to be used, how is the signature encoded? As-is, it's binary packet data, and unsuitable for JSON, is it not?
